calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Off Calendar

Application And Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, First National Bank of Omaha, a National Banking Association.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Armen Abroyan, an individual and Sunshine Daydream, LLC, a limited liability company.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $50569.25
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $620.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $51,189.25
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Continued To Aug-14-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
